Thanks for opening the discussion. Based on the latest market reference I’m seeing around 6.23, I can start at 6.30 per unit for this order. If you’re prepared to commit volume cleanly and move quickly, I can stay flexible on terms, but I’d like to anchor near current market conditions. Opening as the supplier with no buyer offer yet, it makes sense to anchor near the observed market price. This protects margin while leaving some room for negotiation if the buyer counters.
